description: v0.2.7 — execution strategy suggest + contract-aware workflow dispatch.
changelog:
**@blxzer/cursor-trellis 0.2.7 / @blxzer/cursor-trellis-core 0.2.7**

### Added
- feat(task): `suggest-execution-strategy`, `execution-strategy-rules.json`, drift WARN on `start-execution --check`
- docs: `execution-strategy.md` guide; backfilled manifests 0.2.2–0.2.6

### Changed
- workflow: Phase 2 dispatch follows `execution_mode` (`worker` vs `inline` vs `child-task`)

Run `trellis update` in each project.
notes: Full code-touching tasks default-suggest worker + main-worktree; contract in implement.md remains authoritative.
